testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with unsupported language should return INTERNAL_ERROR for java
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with unsupported language should return INTERNAL_ERROR for java

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with unsupported language should preserve expectedOutput in result
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with unsupported language should preserve expectedOutput in result

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with unsupported language should return empty stdout/stderr for unsupported language
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with unsupported language should return empty stdout/stderr for unsupported language

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with supported languages should run python3 with the python image
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with supported languages should run python3 with the python image

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with supported languages should compile and run C++ with gcc image
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with supported languages should compile and run C++ with gcc image

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with supported languages should compile and run C with gcc image
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with supported languages should compile and run C with gcc image

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with javascript should return ACCEPTED when stdout matches expectedOutput
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with javascript should return ACCEPTED when stdout matches expectedOutput

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with javascript should return WRONG_ANSWER when stdout does not match
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with javascript should return WRONG_ANSWER when stdout does not match

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with javascript should return RUNTIME_ERROR on non-zero exit code
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with javascript should return RUNTIME_ERROR on non-zero exit code

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with javascript should return TIME_LIMIT_EXCEEDED when process is killed via SIGTERM
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with javascript should return TIME_LIMIT_EXCEEDED when process is killed via SIGTERM

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with javascript should return INTERNAL_ERROR when docker command is not found (ENOENT)
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with javascript should return INTERNAL_ERROR when docker command is not found (ENOENT)

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with javascript should include stdout and stderr from docker in the result
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with javascript should include stdout and stderr from docker in the result

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with javascript should normalise trailing whitespace / CRLF for comparison
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with javascript should normalise trailing whitespace / CRLF for comparison

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with javascript should clean up the temp workdir even when docker fails
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with javascript should clean up the temp workdir even when docker fails

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with javascript should write both submission.js and runner.js to the workdir
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with javascript should write both submission.js and runner.js to the workdir

testcase.classname: JudgeService run() with javascript should send the input string to docker stdin
testcase.name: JudgeService run() with javascript should send the input string to docker stdin
